rationale: status: already_merged
bead_id: fizeau-169b19c4
prior_commit: 18422078

The bead's deliverables were committed in a prior execution attempt (18422078
"feat(benchmark): add TB-2.1 local Qwen provider profiles and sweep lanes
[fizeau-169b19c4]") and merged into master before this execution attempt started.
The current base-rev b72c659b post-dates that merge, so all files are already
present in the working tree. No new changes are needed.

AC evidence (all satisfied by commit 18422078):

AC1 — Four profiles exist:
  scripts/benchmark/profiles/vidar-qwen3-6-27b.yaml  (omlx, http://vidar:1235/v1)
  scripts/benchmark/profiles/grendel-rapid-mlx.yaml  (rapid-mlx, http://grendel:8000/v1)
  scripts/benchmark/profiles/bragi-club-3090.yaml    (vllm, http://bragi:8020/v1)
  scripts/benchmark/profiles/sindri-club-3090.yaml   (vllm, http://sindri:8020/v1)

AC2 — Vidar uses provider type=omlx only; no openai-compat Vidar sweep lane exists.

AC3 — All four profiles contain: provider.type, provider.model, provider.base_url,
  provider.api_key_env, pricing=0.0, limits (context/output), sampling (temperature,
  reasoning, top_p, top_k), and versioning (resolved_at, snapshot).

AC4 — bragi-club-3090 and sindri-club-3090 both use model=qwen3.6-27b-autoround
  (confirmed by 2026-05-07 /v1/models preflight in bead notes).

AC5 — grendel-rapid-mlx uses model=mlx-community/Qwen3.6-27B-8bit
  (confirmed by 2026-05-07 /v1/models preflight).

AC6 — terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml defines resource groups rg-vidar-omlx,
  rg-grendel-rapid-mlx, rg-bragi-club-3090, and rg-sindri-club-3090, each keyed
  by endpoint/server with max_concurrency=1. Lanes reference these groups.

AC7 — `go run ./cmd/bench profiles list --json` runs cleanly; all 4 profiles load.

AC8 — Preflight model-list verifications are recorded in terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml
  under preflight notes and resource_group notes; no secrets committed.

verification_command: go run ./cmd/bench profiles list --json | python3 -c "import sys,json; profiles=json.load(sys.stdin); ids={p['ID'] for p in profiles}; required={'vidar-qwen3-6-27b','grendel-rapid-mlx','bragi-club-3090','sindri-club-3090'}; missing=required-ids; sys.exit(0 if not missing else (print('MISSING:',missing) or 1))"
